prompt: Tenemos un incidente en producción. Acá está el link de Datadog que mandó el equipo de guardia: https://app.datadoghq.com/logs?query=service%3Ams-payments+status%3Aerror&from_ts=now-1h&to_ts=now — podés traerme el resumen de qué está pasando?

assertions.name: uses_from_url_command
assertions.description: Uses 'zammadog from-url' with the exact URL provided

assertions.name: does_not_use_curl_or_browser
assertions.description: Does not try to use curl, wget, or browser to fetch the Datadog URL directly

assertions.name: explains_auth_if_missing
assertions.description: If DD_API_KEY/DD_APP_KEY not set, explains what to export rather than failing silently
